scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c green,cyan --kill-others-on-fail "npm --prefix packages/api run dev" "npm --prefix apps/web run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix packages/engine run build && npm --prefix packages/api run build && npm --prefix apps/web run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix packages/engine run typecheck && npm --prefix packages/api run typecheck && npm --prefix apps/web run typecheck
